notes: F001 is THE trust-foundation feature -- if this bar fails, Sprint 0 fails. Target user is the retail forex trader evaluating an AI product; the framing to validate is 'trust in 10 seconds'. Data comes from v1 daily-log [TRADE CLOSED] lines + v2 squad_live/events.jsonl close events -- no new backend infrastructure beyond a parser module.
